positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala pattern that blends celestial elements and botanical motifs. The design features interwoven crescent moons, abstract constellations, and stylized blooming flowers (like lotus and jasmine). The style must be high-contrast, clean vector art, utilizing strong, elegant black linework against a clean, neutral background. Incorporate Art Deco geometry and Art Nouveau curves. The composition must be central and perfectly repeating for print use, giving the feel of a sophisticated, minimalist tattoo design. Crisp edges, perfect silhouettes, Zentangle influence, scalable for apparel printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, text, signature, watermark, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, cartoon, photorealism, amateur, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, muddy colors
